benefits.description: Smallest waist ever after 3 years of use

protocol_notes: Uses 2 IU as standard replacement dose at night; uses 4-6 IU during hard training phases for enhanced recovery. Has been on GH for 3 full years and intends lifelong use. Previously spent money on secretagogue peptides before switching to HGH.
